description: You are an Earth Observation Data Engineer. You have downloaded two raw, separate Sentinel-2 band files (Red and NIR) from AWS S3, but they lack their original metadata manifest. Before passing them to the science team, you must reconstruct an Analysis Ready Data (ARD) cube. Using the raw files at /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_B04_red.tif and /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_B08_nir.tif, create a single multi-band product. Rename the bands to 'S2_Red' and 'S2_NIR', and set their spectral wavelengths to 665.0 nm and 842.0 nm respectively. Save the final product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/s2_reconstructed_stack.dim.
